title.en: England's biggest match since 1966 as Three Lions close in on immortality
title.zh-CN: 英格兰自1966年以来最大的比赛，三狮接近永生

summary.en: England face Argentina in the World Cup semi-finals on Wednesday - and BBC Sport's Phil McNulty explains why it is the Three Lions' biggest match since 1966.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队周三在世界杯半决赛中对阵阿根廷队，英国广播公司体育台的菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）解释了为什么这是三狮队自1966年以来最大的一场比赛。

title.en: 'We shouldn't confuse politics and football' - Scaloni on England-Argentina rivalry
title.zh-CN: “我们不应该混淆政治和足球” - Scaloni谈英格兰与阿根廷的竞争

summary.en: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni says he is "not going to mix" football and politics before his side's World Cup semi-final against England.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼（ Lionel Scaloni ）表示，在他的球队对阵英格兰的世界杯半决赛之前，他“不会将足球和政治混为一谈”

title.en: I still feel pain of '98 but this can be different for England - Shearer
title.zh-CN: 我仍然感到98年的痛苦，但这对英格兰来说可能有所不同- Shearer

summary.en: England's defeat by Argentina at the 1998 World Cup still burns deep for Alan Shearer, but he explains why this team can take their chance to change their lives forever.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在1998年世界杯上被阿根廷队击败，这对艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）来说仍然意义深远，但他解释了为什么这支球队可以抓住机会永远改变他们的生活。

title.en: Mates, mate and freedom - how Argentina got the best out of Messi
title.zh-CN: 伴侣，伴侣和自由-阿根廷如何充分利用梅西

summary.en: Guillem Balague examines how the Argentina squad is built around Lionel Messi as they prepare to play against England in the World Cup semi-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 吉列姆·巴拉格（ Guillem Balague ）研究了阿根廷队是如何围绕莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）建立起来的，因为他们准备在世界杯半决赛中对阵英格兰队

title.en: Keane was Kane's England team-mate - this week they are on different paths
title.zh-CN: 基恩是凯恩的英格兰队友-本周他们走上了不同的道路

summary.en: Will Keane and Harry Kane used to be team-mates for England Under-19s - but this week the former strike partners are on very different paths.
summary.zh-CN: 威尔·基恩和哈里·凯恩曾经是英格兰19岁以下的队友，但本周前罢工伙伴的道路截然不同。

title.en: Bournemouth in talks for Benfica defender Silva
title.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯与本菲卡后卫席尔瓦会谈

summary.en: Bournemouth enter talks to sign Benfica and Portugal defender Antonio Silva as Marcos Senesi's replacement.
summary.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯进入谈判，签下本菲卡和葡萄牙后卫安东尼奥·席尔瓦作为马科斯·塞内西的替补。

title.en: 'Extremely happy' Deschamps gets the farewell game no-one wants
title.zh-CN: “非常高兴” Deschamps获得了没人想要的告别游戏

summary.en: Didier Deschamps' long, storied career with France will come to an end not how he would have wanted it - in Saturday's World Cup third-place play-off.
summary.zh-CN: 迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）在法国漫长而传奇的职业生涯将在周六的世界杯第三名附加赛中结束，而不是他想要的结果。
